events.label: assistant
events.text: Diagnosis written to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: belt mistracking with two competing root causes — off-center loading vs. idler skew — distinguished by running the belt empty (load-related faults clear up unloaded; idler skew persists unloaded along the whole run). Marked `fail`/medium risk pending lockout, alignment/loading checks per CEMA, and guarding compliance under OSHA 1910.212.
